dependency_edges.reason: Mutation routes must reuse registry-owned validation, built-in id protection, source normalization, and diagnostics.
Desktop Settings must call server-owned mutation APIs rather than writing workflow config directly.
Settings CRUD/import/export UI depends on typed client methods and validation issue handling.
Linked workflow starts must snapshot templates through the same path used by POST /api/sessions.
Summarize context strategy must not invoke the mutating /compact command path against the source chat.
Non-empty Chat Workflows entry depends on linked-start route errors and returned target session summary.

critical_path: Registry validation and lossless write preservation
Chat Workflows entry and context strategy UI

parallel_ready_batches.join_condition: Server and desktop contract expectations are explicit before production route/service work.
Registry validation/write behavior is stable before route mutation work.
Desktop API/types and linked-session tests are ready before UI/service consumers.
Independent UI and service slices land with no overlapping write scopes.

validation_gates: bun run check:persistence-upgrade when persistence shape changes beyond additive workflows.json fields
quickstart.md manual smoke or explicit blocker for provider-backed summarize evidence
integration_notes: Sequence server registry/API first because Settings and Chat selection depend on consistent template diagnostics.
The linked-session service is the highest-risk integration point because it joins session creation, transcript reads, compaction semantics, idempotency, and desktop navigation.
Manual smoke should use isolated CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR where possible.
